headline: Comcast Eyes Franchise Power As Mario Hit And Dungeon Crawler Arrive
summary: Comcast's "Super Mario Galaxy" has delivered the year's biggest global box office launch. The company is preparing to release a live action "Dungeon Crawler Carl" adaptation on Peacock. These projects highlight Comcast's push to use well known franchises across theaters and streaming. For investors watching NasdaqGS:CMCSA, this run of high profile content comes at a time when the share price sits at $27.66. The stock has seen a 13.3% decline over the past 30 days and a 35.4% decline over 5...

headline: Has Comcast (CMCSA) Become More Attractive After Its Recent Share Price Weakness?
summary: If you are wondering whether Comcast's current share price reflects its true worth, this breakdown is designed to help you make sense of the numbers behind the stock. Comcast shares last closed at US$27.66, after returns of a 4.3% decline over 7 days, a 13.3% decline over 30 days, a 6.4% decline year to date and a 7.9% decline over the past year that may signal shifting expectations around risk and potential. These moves come as Comcast continues to attract attention in markets, with...

headline: SCHD's Biggest Reconstitution In Years: Here's What Investors Need To Know
summary: Schwab U.S. Dividend Equity ETF (SCHD) underwent a major reconstitution, increasing portfolio turnover to 31%.

headline: Mideast Sovereign Wealth Funds Back Paramount’s WBD Takeover
summary: Saudi Arabia’s Public Investment Fund, the Qatar Investment Authority, and Abu Dhabi’s L’imad Holding Co are all aboard, per the WSJ.
